item.title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship on way to Canary Islands after three evacuated
item.description: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.

item.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
item.description: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

item.title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
item.description: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

item.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
item.description: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

item.title: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages
item.description: An international air body suggests wider acceptance of US-grade jet fuel could help to head off any supply problems.

item.title: Is this actually what Anne Boleyn looked like?
item.description: An algorithm has suggested images of what were thought to be Anne Boleyn might not be.

item.title: Watch: Drone delivers first Amazon parcels in UK
item.description: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.

item.title: Anger and resignation in Tenerife as hantavirus ship approaches
item.description: Some on the Spanish island worry the imminent arrival of the MV Hondius could pose a health risk.

item.title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
item.description: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.

item.title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
item.description: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

item.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
item.description: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

item.title: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
item.description: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

item.title: Hovering objects and flashing lights: what we learned from UFO documents released by the Pentagon
item.description: The US has published transcripts, video clips and audio recordings about unidentified flying objects.

item.title: US jobs data beats expectations for second month in a row
item.description: The solid figures came despite rising gas prices and economic uncertainty sparked by the Iran war.

item.title: What is hantavirus and how does it spread?
item.description: The Andes strain of the virus, which can rarely be passed from person to person, has been confirmed in some passengers.

item.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
item.description: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

item.title: Putin denounces Nato at scaled back Victory Day parade
item.description: The Russian leader used his annual speech to justify his so-called special military operation in Ukraine.

item.title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
item.description: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

item.title: Hungary's new PM to be sworn in during 'regime change' party
item.description: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.

item.title: The companies making billions from the Iran war
item.description: Through surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.

item.title: The UK is set for a staycation summer - and there are plenty of hidden gems
item.description: Seasoned staycationers share their favourite spots as Airbnb and Booking.com say interest in UK stays are up on last year.

item.title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
item.description: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

item.title: Major train operator to be renationalised in months
item.description: GWR, which runs trains between London and South Wales, will come under government control.

item.title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board stranded ship after hantavirus outbreak
item.description: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

item.title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
item.description: Some passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus have already taken flights to numerous countries.
